'''janate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:glabrescently|glabrescently]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glabrescently|glabrescently]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| janate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:janate|janate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:janatesher|janatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:janatesherĂ«m|janatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:janatero|janatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:janateshĂ«|janateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:janateshĂ«m|janateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijanatero|gokijanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijanateshĂ«|gokijanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijanateshĂ«m|gokijanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojanankerom|gojanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojanankeshĂ«|gojanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojanankeshĂ«m|gojanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojanankeya|gojanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:janaterom|janaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:janatemu|janatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:janateya|janateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijanaterom|gokijanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijanatemu|gokijanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijanateya|gokijanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jananate|jananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jananatesher|jananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jananatesherĂ«m|jananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jananatero|jananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jananateshĂ«|jananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jananateshĂ«m|jananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijananatero|gokijananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijananateshĂ«|gokijananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijananateshĂ«m|gokijananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojananankerom|gojananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojananankeshĂ«|gojananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojananankeshĂ«m|gojananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojananankeya|gojananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jananaterom|jananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jananatemu|jananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jananateya|jananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijananaterom|gokijananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijananatemu|gokijananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijananateya|gokijananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠnĂŠte|jĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠnĂŠtesher|jĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠnĂŠtero|jĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠnĂŠtero|gokijĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠnĂŠterom|jĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠnĂŠteya|jĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠnĂŠterom|gokijĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠnĂŠteya|gokijĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafnafte|jafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafnaftesher|jafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafnaftesherĂ«m|jafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafnaftero|jafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafnafteshĂ«|jafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafnafteshĂ«m|jafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafnaftero|gokijafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafnafteshĂ«|gokijafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafnafteshĂ«m|gokijafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafnafnkerom|gojafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafnafnkeshĂ«|gojafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafnafnkeshĂ«m|gojafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafnafnkeya|gojafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafnafterom|jafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafnaftemu|jafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafnafteya|jafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafnafterom|gokijafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafnaftemu|gokijafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafnafteya|gokijafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
